title: coelogyne cinnabarina var. sanguineum
intro: Coelogyne cinnabarina var. sanguineum, also known as the Sanguine Coelogyne, is a rare orchid species native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Coelogyne cinnabarina var. sanguineum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
